product.name: Lipstick
selling_points: Unlike ordinary lipsticks that leave marks on cups, this lipstick stays put, keeps cups clean, and resists smudging during daily wear.

creative_strategy.core_pain: Lipstick transferring onto cups, leaving embarrassing rim marks and forcing touch-ups.
creative_strategy.promise: A transfer-resistant lipstick that keeps cups clean while color stays put on your lips through everyday sips.

character.appearance: Adult woman with healthy natural skin and polished makeup focused on smooth, even lips wearing the same shade as the product reference.
character.wardrobe: Simple cream or off-white top to keep focus on the lips and product.
character.hair_makeup: Neatly styled hair (low ponytail or tucked behind ears), soft complexion makeup, light eye makeup, satin lip finish matching the product.
character.performance_style: Calm, minimal gestures, small smile; deliberate, unhurried movements suitable for a clean product demo.

scene.location: Minimal light-wood tabletop by a softly lit window in a neutral room.
scene.lighting: Soft diffused daylight look with gentle fill; no harsh shadows or glare.
scene.background: Neutral beige or soft gray wall, uncluttered background.

product.visual_identity: Bullet lipstick matching the provided reference image; cap off with bullet exposed; if a brand mark is present on the tube, keep it visible without inventing new logos. Shade should match the reference image color.
product.proof_prop: Plain white ceramic mug used for the sip and rim inspection.

single_shot.visual_prompt: Locked-off camera medium close-up of an adult woman seated at a minimal light-wood table by a softly lit window. She wears a neutral cream top and a smooth, even application of a rosy lipstick that matches the provided product reference. On the table in front of her: a plain white ceramic mug and the real lipstick tube from the reference with its cap off, bullet exposed, logo facing camera if present. Soft diffused daylight illuminates her face and the tabletop, with a clean, uncluttered beige background. She naturally lifts the white mug with one hand, takes a small comfortable sip, then sets the mug down. With a calm, deliberate motion, she rotates the mug so the rim faces the camera and brings the rim closer until it fills more of the frame; the rim appears clean with no visible lipstick mark. She holds the mug steady for a clear inspection beat while giving a subtle, confident smile. The lipstick tube remains visible on the table near the mug throughout. Final hold keeps the clean white rim large in frame, her lips in soft focus behind it, and the product tube clearly present. Camera stays steady, gentle soft lighting, natural skin texture, smooth minimal movement.
single_shot.start_key_image_prompt: A single still frame showing the adult woman at a light-wood table by a softly lit window, framed chest-up. She wears a cream top and a fresh application of the same lipstick shade as the product reference. In her near hand she lightly holds a plain white ceramic mug just below her lips, about to sip. On the table near the mug lies the real lipstick tube from the provided product image, cap off, bullet exposed, with any existing logo facing camera. Lighting is soft and diffused; background is neutral and uncluttered. The composition is stable and clean, ready for a simple sip and rim reveal.
single_shot.negative_prompt: visible lipstick mark on mug rim; smudged or messy lipstick; lipstick on teeth; distorted or uncanny lips; warped or duplicated fingers; extra hands; deformed or transparent mug; glass cup; chipped mug; harsh glare or overexposure; shaky handheld camera; abrupt cuts or montage; split screens; unreadable tiny logos or invented brands; mismatched lip color vs product; extreme close-up warping; heavy motion blur; noisy or cluttered background; mirror reflections; wet, drippy gloss; cracked or overly dry lips.
single_shot.text: No cup marks • Color stays put
single_shot.audio: Soft, polished upbeat track; subtle sip SFX on the drink; optional gentle VO: “No cup marks. Color stays.” Keep audio clean and minimal.
